concepts.name: Wheeler-DeWitt Equation
concepts.description: The fundamental equation of quantum gravity that describes the quantum state of the universe
key_points: Hamiltonian constraint in canonical quantum gravity

concepts.name: Minisuperspace Model
concepts.description: Simplified truncation of full quantum gravity to homogeneous isotropic metrics
key_points: Scale factor a(t) as configuration variable
Scalar field phi as additional degree of freedom
Reduces infinite-dimensional problem to finite dimensions

concepts.name: Loop Quantum Cosmology (LQC)
concepts.description: Quantum cosmology based on loop quantum gravity techniques
key_points: Effective equations derived from polymer-like representations

concepts.name: Hartle-Hawking Wavefunction
concepts.description: No-boundary proposal for the wavefunction of the universe

equations.name: Wheeler-DeWitt Equation (Minisuperspace)
equations.latex: partial^2 Psi / partial a^2 + partial^2 Psi / partial phi^2 + (a sin(a phi))/(a phi) Psi = 0
equations.description: Simplified form for a simple minisuperspace model with scale factor a and scalar field phi

equations.name: LQC Effective Hamiltonian Constraint
equations.latex: H_eff = -p_phi^2/(2 kappa gamma^2 rho_bar) + rho_c/(3 kappa) sin^2(lambda_bar c) + rho_c/(3 kappa) lambda_bar^2 c cos(lambda_bar c) = 0
equations.description: Effective constraint equation in LQC with holonomy corrections

equations.name: LQC Bounce Condition
equations.description: Density at which classical Big Bang singularity is replaced by quantum bounce

equations.name: Hartle-Hawking No-Boundary Action
equations.latex: S_E = 1/(8 pi G) int d^4x sqrt(g)(R - 2 Lambda)
equations.description: Euclidean Einstein-Hilbert action for no-boundary proposal

parameters.name: Scalar Field Mass
parameters.description: Mass of the inflaton scalar field

parameters.name: Critical Density
parameters.description: Maximum density in LQC before bounce

parameters.name: Planck Length
parameters.description: Fundamental length scale in quantum gravity

models.name: Simple Minisuperspace
models.description: FRW with scalar field, no spatial curvature
